contracts.description: Primary design baseline document produced by architect, transforming feature specifications into structured technical designs
Structured document capturing unresolved design questions with impact analysis and temporary assumptions
Document capturing identified risks, their severity, mitigation strategies, and trade-off decisions made during design
Definition of module boundaries, ownership assignments, and interface contracts between modules
Developer-produced artifact documenting code changes, goal achievement, and known issues
Developer self-validation report showing compliance with coding rules and implementation requirements
Report documenting bug fix implementation with root cause analysis and verification evidence
Tester-produced report recording tests run, pass/fail summary, coverage gaps, and confidence level
Document defining test scope, boundary conditions, and risk-based testing priorities
Analysis of regression risks from code changes with recommended regression test scope
Independent review report with severity-classified findings, governance alignment status, and actionable recommendations
Structured feedback for developer with must-fix items, improvement suggestions, and clear acceptance conditions
Formal record of acceptance decision with conditions, evidence, and traceability to upstream artifacts
Documentation synchronization report recording changes made, evidence consumed, and downstream handoff recommendation
Structured changelog entry with change type classification, capability changes, and breaking changes notes
Security review report with vulnerability findings, CWE/OWASP references, and gate decision
Focused security review for input validation with attack vectors analysis and remediation guidance
